senses.definition: a round green vegetable with a cluster of thick green leaves that form a bud, used in cooking

examples.x: He dipped a leaf of the artichoke into the tangy sauce.
They steamed the artichoke until the leaves were tender.
The chef prepared a delicious appetizer of grilled artichokes drizzled with olive oil and lemon.
Artichokes are packed with nutrients and are known for their unique flavor and texture.
She learned how to properly trim and steam artichokes to serve as a healthy side dish for dinner.

senses.definition: a long green vegetable with edible stems, used in cooking or eaten raw

examples.x: She valued the high nutritional content and low-calorie nature of asparagus in his diet.
She served a side dish of roasted asparagus seasoned with garlic and parmesan cheese.

senses.definition: a plant of the mint family with aromatic leaves that are eaten raw or cooked

examples.x: Among all herbs, basil is my favorite.
She visited the farmer's market and bought a bunch of fresh basil.
With a touch of creativity, I added basil as a garnish to my fruit salad.

senses.definition: a small hollow fruit, typically red or green, etc., used in cooking or eaten raw

examples.x: She added chopped bell pepper to the salad for extra crunch.
The recipe called for a mix of bell peppers in different colors.
I like to stuff bell peppers with rice and meat for a hearty meal.
The dish was seasoned with roasted bell pepper and garlic.
Bell peppers are rich in vitamin C and add a sweet flavor to dishes.

senses.definition: the flower head of a plant from the cabbage family that is white in color and is eaten as a vegetable

examples.x: The chef created a creamy cauliflower soup garnished with fresh herbs for a comforting winter meal.
Cauliflower rice has become a popular low-carb alternative to traditional rice for those watching their carbohydrate intake.
She roasted cauliflower florets with spices and olive oil until they were golden brown and crispy.

senses.definition: a plant with feathery leaves and a round thick stem, used as a vegetable or for adding flavor to food

examples.x: He discovered that fennel tea helped soothe his upset stomach.
I love using fennel in my recipes as it adds a unique and pleasant smell to the dish.
We discovered that fennel not only enhances the flavor but also provides digestive benefits.

senses.definition: a thick and spicy root with pale brown color used as a seasoning in cooking, particularly in powder form

examples.x: He brewed a cup of ginger tea to soothe his upset stomach.
She used ginger essential oil to create a relaxing atmosphere in her bedroom.
They planted ginger roots in their backyard garden and eagerly waited for them to sprout.

senses.definition: a plant of the onion family with layers of green leaves and a white stem, used in cooking

examples.x: It was a challenge to find leeks at the grocery store, but she finally got her hands on them.
She found comfort in a warm bowl of creamy leek and potato soup on a rainy afternoon.
The soup simmered on the stove, filled with chunks of potato and sliced leeks for a hearty winter meal.
The chef prepared a savory quiche filled with leeks, mushrooms, and Gruyère cheese for brunch.
In traditional French cuisine, leeks are often used to add flavor to stocks, stews, and soups.

senses.definition: a type of vegetable with long green seed cases, used in cooking

examples.x: They used okra to thicken their stew and enhance its texture and taste.
When preparing okra, remember to cut off the ends and avoid overcooking to maintain its texture and flavor.
The chef added fresh okra to the gumbo, giving the dish its signature thick texture and unique flavor.
She grew okra in her backyard garden, excited to harvest the pods for her homemade pickles.

senses.definition: an aromatic plant with curly green leaves, used for garnishing food or in cooking

examples.x: He garnished his pasta dish with freshly chopped parsley to add a vibrant touch of green.
My mother always sprinkles some dried parsley into the soup to enhance its flavor.
She harvested a bunch of parsley from her rooftop garden.
The recipe calls for a handful of finely chopped parsley.

senses.definition: a root vegetable with creamy flesh and white and purple skin, used in cooking

examples.x: He used turnip leaves as natural wrapping for steamed dumplings.
I sliced the turnips into thin rounds and pickled them.
The farmer harvested a large crop of turnips, which he planned to sell at the local market.
She added diced turnips to the stew, allowing them to cook down and add a subtle sweetness to the dish.

senses.definition: a plant having small aromatic leaves used for flavoring food

examples.x: My son loves the aroma of thyme that fills the air whenever we bake a delicious pizza together.
She sprinkled fresh thyme over the roasted chicken to enhance its flavor with a hint of earthiness.
The recipe called for a teaspoon of dried thyme to add a fragrant, herbal note to the vegetable soup.
In her herb garden, she cultivated thyme alongside rosemary and basil, enjoying the aromatic trio in her cooking.

senses.definition: a small, round, and often dried seed that is high in protein and is used for cooking soups, stews, etc.

examples.x: She carefully arranged a colorful lentil salad, featuring a variety of fresh vegetables and a tangy dressing.
The vegetarian lentil burger delighted my taste buds with its savory and wholesome flavors.
The vegetarian stew was hearty and nutritious, featuring a mix of lentils, carrots, and celery.
She made a delicious lentil salad with tomatoes, cucumbers, and a tangy vinaigrette dressing.

senses.definition: food that is made by baking a batter or dough in an oven

examples.x: The bakery displayed an array of freshly baked goods in the storefront window.
She brought a platter of homemade baked goods to the potluck dinner, including cookies, brownies, and muffins.
The neighborhood coffee shop offered a variety of baked goods, from croissants to scones, for customers to enjoy with their morning brew.
The bakery prided itself on using high-quality ingredients to craft artisanal baked goods that delighted customers.
The smell of freshly baked goods wafted through the air, drawing customers into the quaint bakery on the corner.

senses.definition: very small pieces of bread, used in cooking especially for coating items of food before frying

examples.x: Coat fish fillets with breadcrumbs and pan-fry them until they are golden and crispy.
Sprinkle breadcrumbs over creamy soups or chowders to add a delightful crunch.
She coated the chicken breasts with breadcrumbs before frying them to achieve a crispy, golden crust.
For the casserole, he sprinkled a mixture of breadcrumbs and cheese on top to create a crunchy, savory topping.
The recipe called for fresh breadcrumbs, so she processed a few slices of bread in the food processor.

senses.definition: a small bread roll that is round and flat in shape

examples.x: He opted for a veggie burger on a whole wheat bun, choosing a healthier option for lunch.

senses.definition: a sauce made with tomatoes, garlic, onion, vinegar, etc. that is usually served with barbecued food

examples.x: The food truck offered a unique twist on classic barbecue, featuring a spicy and tangy barbecue sauce with a hint of citrus.
They gathered around the picnic table, passing around a bottle of barbecue sauce to enhance the flavor of their hamburgers.
He slathered the ribs with a generous amount of barbecue sauce before placing them on the grill to caramelize.
The homemade barbecue sauce had a perfect balance of sweetness and tanginess, making it an instant hit at the cookout.
She marinated the chicken wings in spicy barbecue sauce overnight for maximum flavor.
The pulled pork sandwich was topped with coleslaw and a drizzle of smoky barbecue sauce.

senses.definition: a piece of fish fillet coated with breadcrumbs and then fried

examples.x: She served crispy fish sticks with tartar sauce for a quick and satisfying weeknight dinner.
The cafeteria offered fish sticks as a lunch option, served with a side of seasoned fries.
He packed fish sticks in his lunchbox, knowing they were his son's favorite meal.
The children eagerly dipped their fish sticks in ketchup, enjoying the crunchy texture and mild flavor.
The freezer aisle at the grocery store had a variety of fish stick brands to choose from, ranging from traditional to gluten-free options.

senses.definition: a soft white food made with mashed soybean

examples.x: Tofu can be blended with spices and herbs to create a creamy vegan salad dressing.
Tonight we have a delicious tofu stir-fry with fresh vegetables and a flavorful sauce.
She marinated the tofu in a blend of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger before grilling it to perfection.
Tofu is a versatile ingredient that can be used in both savory and sweet dishes, making it a staple in many vegetarian diets.
The stir-fry included crispy tofu cubes along with a colorful mix of vegetables and a spicy sauce.

senses.definition: a small, dark, and dried grape that does not have seeds, particularly used in cakes

examples.x: She added a handful of currants to the muffin batter, infusing the breakfast treats with bursts of sweet flavor.
He sprinkled currants over the top of the fruitcake before baking, adding a pop of color and sweetness to the dessert.
The pastry chef used dried currants to create a delectable filling for her Danish pastries, pleasing customers with their juicy texture.
The recipe called for currants to be soaked in rum overnight before being folded into the cake batter, enhancing the dessert's rich flavor.
She snacked on a handful of dried currants, enjoying their chewy texture and natural sweetness.

senses.definition: a small yellowish-green or red fruit with a sharp flavor, growing on thorny bushes

examples.x: Gooseberry pie is a classic summer dessert that is both sweet and tangy.
Grandma's gooseberry crumble is always a hit at family gatherings.
She picked fresh gooseberries from the garden to make a tangy and sweet gooseberry jam.
Gooseberries are rich in antioxidants and vitamin C, making them a nutritious addition to fruit salads and desserts.
The tartness of gooseberries pairs well with sweet desserts like crumbles and cobblers.

senses.definition: a tropical fruit with pink juicy flesh, native to Mexico and Central America

examples.x: I enjoyed a ripe guava as a quick and healthy snack.
The guava jam spread generously on toast was a sweet and flavorful start to my morning.
The tropical fruit salad was bursting with flavor, featuring chunks of ripe guava alongside pineapple and mango.
She enjoyed eating guava slices sprinkled with chili powder for a spicy-sweet snack.

senses.definition: a tomato-like fruit with orange skin that is bittersweet in taste

examples.x: My grandma bakes a delicious persimmon pie every Thanksgiving.
She savored the sweet and juicy flesh of a ripe persimmon, enjoying its unique flavor and texture.
Persimmons are rich in vitamins and minerals, making them a nutritious addition to salads, desserts, and smoothies.

senses.definition: a yellow and hard fruit that looks like a pear and has a sweet smell, particularly used for making jam or jelly

examples.x: Roasting quince with honey and cinnamon creates a delicious dessert.
She cooked quince slices with sugar and spices to make a deliciously fragrant compote.
The tartness of quince pairs well with savory dishes like roasted meats and cheeses.

senses.definition: a type of tropical fruit whose skin is purple in color and has many seeds within, native to South America

examples.x: I couldn't resist trying the passion fruit sorbet at the ice cream shop.
The passion fruit smoothie is a popular choice at the café.
She sliced open a ripe passion fruit and scooped out the juicy seeds to enjoy as a refreshing snack.
Passion fruit vines climbed the trellis in her backyard, producing fragrant flowers and exotic fruit.
The tropical smoothie was made with a blend of mango, pineapple, and passion fruit for a burst of flavor.

senses.definition: a small orange-like fruit with sweet skin and bitter-tasting flesh

examples.x: My father tried a kumquat for the first time and was pleasantly surprised by its sweet and tangy flavor.
The small size of kumquats makes them a convenient and healthy snack option.
She enjoyed the sweet-tart flavor of kumquats, eating them whole, including the peel.
He made a kumquat marmalade, simmering the fruit with sugar and spices until it reached a thick, jammy consistency.

senses.definition: a type of dish made with layers of lasagna topped with meat or vegetables and sauce and then cooked, originated in Italy

examples.x: She baked a delicious lasagna layered with rich marinara sauce, creamy ricotta cheese, and savory ground beef.
The vegetarian lasagna was made with layers of spinach, mushrooms, and zucchini, topped with melted mozzarella cheese.
He prepared a classic lasagna recipe passed down through generations, featuring homemade pasta sheets and a hearty meat sauce.
The aroma of bubbling lasagna filled the kitchen, enticing everyone to the dinner table.

senses.definition: meat of chickens, turkeys, and ducks

examples.x: I bought a whole chicken from the grocery store to make a delicious poultry dish for dinner.
Poultry is a lean source of protein and a healthier alternative to red meat.
She prepared a mouthwatering chicken curry using a blend of spices and tender pieces of poultry.

senses.definition: a dish of vegetables or meat cooked at a low temperature in liquid in a closed container

examples.x: The slow cooker churned out a delicious vegetable stew, bubbling away all day to meld the flavors together.
The restaurant's signature seafood stew was a favorite among diners, featuring a medley of fresh fish, shrimp, and clams in a savory broth.

senses.definition: a sweetened food made from cooked lemons, oranges, etc., used as a spread or filling

examples.x: I spread some marmalade on my toast this morning.
She prefers marmalade over regular jam because of the citrus flavor.
The marmalade was made with fresh oranges from the garden.
They bought a jar of homemade marmalade from the local market.
I don't like the chunks of peel in marmalade, but it’s my sister’s favorite.

senses.definition: a cold dessert with a smooth fluffy texture and with chocolate, fruit, etc.

examples.x: The patisserie offered a variety of fruit mousses, from raspberry to mango, each bursting with vibrant flavor.
He whipped up a light and airy lemon mousse for dessert, garnished with fresh berries for a pop of color.
The dessert menu featured a classic tiramisu mousse, layered with espresso-soaked ladyfingers and mascarpone cream.

senses.definition: a pie with no top filled with something sweet or savory

examples.x: The bakery displayed an assortment of fruit tarts, showcasing vibrant berries and tangy citrus flavors.
He enjoyed a savory mushroom tart for lunch, topped with creamy goat cheese and fresh herbs.
The dessert menu featured a decadent chocolate tart, its rich ganache filling encased in a crisp pastry shell.
She whipped up a quick tomato and basil tart for a light dinner, using ripe tomatoes and fragrant basil from the garden.

senses.definition: a thick sweet liquid made with sugar that is often used as a sauce

examples.x: He drizzled syrup over his waffles, creating a delicious breakfast.
She made a refreshing summer drink by combining syrup with sparkling water and lemon.
The restaurant served fluffy pancakes with a side of syrup, pleasing their hungry customers.
The syrup from the canned peaches was used to glaze the cake.
The dessert was drizzled with a caramel syrup that added sweetness.

senses.definition: a type of flavor that is artificially made or is obtained from the beans of a tropical plant that adds a sweet taste and smell to the food

examples.x: The baker used a teaspoon of vanilla in the cake batter to give it a rich and aromatic flavor.
Vanilla is one of the most popular flavors used in baking and dessert recipes worldwide.
When making homemade ice cream, adding vanilla beans or extract is essential for achieving a creamy and delicious taste.
